knowledge.title: Where is my order / package?
knowledge.description: Users can check the real-time shipping status of their order. The system can look up tracking information including current status, location updates, and estimated delivery. For order outside of NL: When the tracking info states it arrived in the destination country we can assure the user that the package is with the local postal service will arrive soon. However, we do not have control over local postal services and cannot provide more detailed tracking updates once it has left the Netherlands.

requiredData.name: orderNumber
requiredData.description: The order number (like 100002493) that was provided in the confirmation email
requiredData.userPrompt: your order number (you can find this in your confirmation email)

requiredData.name: email
requiredData.description: The email address used when placing the order
requiredData.userPrompt: the email address you used when placing your order

knowledge.title: Will QRSong! continue its service in the future? And what will happen if it discontinues?
knowledge.description: QRSong! is committed to providing a long-term service for creating and using QR music cards. We have plans to continue improving and expanding our offerings. In the unlikely event that we discontinue the service, we will provide ample notice to our users. Digital versions of purchased cards will remain accessible for download, and we will explore options to ensure continued functionality of existing cards, such as open-sourcing parts of the app or partnering with other services.

knowledge.title: My cards do not work / The app is playing the wrong songs, what can I do?
knowledge.description: If the app plays the wrong songs or the QR codes do not work, please first make sure you're using the latest version of the QRSong! app. If you're using Spotify without Premium, hidden mode is unavailable — you can switch to a different playback mode in the app settings. We suggest either 'No Spotify mode', or switching the music service to Tidal or Deezer (no subscription needed for either) for full hidden playback. If the problem persists, contact support at info@qrsong.io with details and screenshots if possible.

knowledge.title: Can I bundle multiple digital playlists into one order to save on costs?
knowledge.description: Yes! You can bundle multiple digital playlists into a single order to take advantage of volume discounts. Simply add multiple playlists to your cart before checkout, and the system will automatically apply the appropriate discount based on the number of playlists ordered.

knowledge.title: Can I pay extra for express production or shipping?
knowledge.description: Express production: YES. Express shipping: NO. For physical orders our standard production time is 2-3 business days. You can speed up production with our express option for an additional 20% — your order is moved to the front of the queue, and if you approve your playlist before 13:00 it usually gets printed and shipped the same day. To request express production, email us at info@qrsong.io after approving your playlist and we'll send you a payment link. We do NOT offer express shipping. Once your order leaves our facility it travels with our standard carriers, and we cannot upgrade or speed up the postal delivery itself.

knowledge.title: The system does not show the correct amount of tracks in my playlist, why?
knowledge.description: Did you by any chance change your playlist recently? QRSong! caches your playlist to reduce load on Spotify's servers. If you modified your playlist, click the 'Refresh playlist' button at the top of the summary list to reload it from Spotify.

knowledge.title: What is QRSong?
knowledge.description: QRSong! is a service that generates QR music game cards based on your Spotify playlists. You can create cards from your own playlist or choose from curated selections. The cards link to your music and can be scanned with the free QRSong! companion app to play a music guessing game.

knowledge.title: I have changed my mind, can I upgrade my digital order to physical cards?
knowledge.description: Yes, you can upgrade your digital order to physical cards. Please contact support with your order details and we will provide you with a discount code for the difference in price. Once you have the discount code, you can place a new order for physical cards using that code at checkout. Note that the original digital order will remain valid and you will still have access to the digital version as well.

knowledge.title: Can I cancel my order?
knowledge.description: Yes, as long as the order has not been taken into production we can cancel it for you. Please contact support as soon as possible with your order details. Once production has started, we cannot cancel orders due to the custom nature of our products. If you want to cancel a digital PDF order because you want to upgrade to physical cards instead, we can provide you with a discount code for the difference in price. Please contact support for assistance at info@qrsong.io

knowledge.title: What if one of my QR codes is broken or the Spotify track is no longer available?
knowledge.description: We can fix broken QR codes for you free of charge. Please contact support at info@qrsong.io with your order details and the specific tracks that are broken or unavailable. If possible, also provide an alternative Spotify (or Apple Music / Tidal / Deezer / YouTube Music) link to the same song.

knowledge.title: What is the digital version? And will I receive one if I order physical cards?
knowledge.description: The digital version is a PDF file with your QR cards that you can download, print, and cut out yourself. It is delivered instantly via email (or after our team verifies the release years for custom playlists, usually within 24 hours). To print it yourself you'll need a color printer, thicker paper (we recommend at least 200gsm) and scissors or a paper cutter. Important: every physical order automatically includes the digital version at no extra cost, so you can start playing right away while you wait for the printed cards to arrive.

knowledge.title: Do the cards come in a box?
knowledge.description: By default the cards arrive in a mailbox-friendly transport box, neatly tied together with a paper band. You can also opt into a personalized gift box during checkout: a 12x12cm foldable presentation box with a window on the lid, a custom insert card you design yourself, and a personal message on the back. Important to know about the quality: the gift box is decorative gift packaging, not a rigid premade game box like the ones you find with common retail board games. It ships as a flat printed A3 cardboard sheet that you press out and fold into shape yourself at home (no glue or tools needed, just a few minutes of folding along the pre-scored creases). Personalized hard, rigid game boxes at retail quality simply aren't produced by print-on-demand companies. For larger business orders (more than 50 boxes) we can produce fully custom branded rigid boxes; see the branded-boxes entry.

knowledge.title: How many cards fit in a gift box?
knowledge.description: Each gift box holds up to 190 QR music cards and includes a built-in divider. If your playlist is larger than that, additional boxes are added automatically — one extra box for every 190 cards. So a 250-card playlist ships with 2 boxes, 400 cards ships with 3, and so on. The number of boxes is shown during checkout, so you always know what's coming. You can never order fewer or more boxes than your card count requires; the count is fixed by the size of your playlist. About the box itself: each box is a 12x12cm foldable presentation box that ships flat as a printed A3 cardboard sheet you press out and fold at home. It is decorative gift packaging, not a rigid premade game box like the ones you find with common retail board games.

knowledge.title: What can I customize on the gift box?
knowledge.description: The gift box itself has a fixed printed exterior design with a window on the lid. You personalize it by designing the insert card that sits behind that window. You can customize four things: (1) the lid image visible through the window, (2) a logo placed on top of the lid image, (3) the inside background visible when you open the box, and (4) a personal message on the back of the insert card. About the box itself: it is decorative gift packaging, not a rigid premade game box like the ones you find with common retail board games. The exterior design is fixed (you cannot fully reskin the outside of the box) because the box ships as a flat printed A3 cardboard sheet that you press out and fold yourself at home. Personalization happens entirely on the insert card behind the window.

knowledge.title: How do I fold or build the gift box? Are there instructions?
knowledge.description: Yes! The gift box arrives flat as a printed A3 cardboard sheet that you press out and fold yourself at home. It takes a few minutes and needs no glue or tools, just follow the pre-scored creases. We have a step-by-step video tutorial that walks you through the whole process: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OE3DsOM81Qo. The same video is also shown on the gift box page and during the box-design step in the order flow.

knowledge.title: How much does the gift box cost? Is there a bulk discount?
knowledge.description: A single gift box costs €6.99. When a playlist needs multiple boxes, the per-box price drops automatically: 2 boxes cost €6.00 each (save 14%), 3 boxes are €5.00 each (save 29%), 4 boxes are €4.50 each (save 36%), and 5 or more boxes are just €4.00 each (save 43%). The discount applies per playlist in the cart, and the exact total — including any savings — is shown during checkout before payment. So a 250-card playlist (which needs 2 boxes) costs €12.00 in box add-ons, and a 400-card playlist (3 boxes) costs €15.00. What you get for that price: a 12x12cm decorative gift box that ships flat as a printed A3 cardboard sheet you press out and fold yourself at home, together with a custom-printed insert card you designed. It is gift packaging, not a rigid premade game box like the ones you find with common retail board games. Personalized hard retail-quality boxes simply aren't produced by print-on-demand companies, which is why our box is intentionally designed as foldable gift packaging.

knowledge.title: Can I have multiple card designs within a single playlist order?
knowledge.description: No, each order uses a single card design. If you'd like multiple designs, split your Spotify playlist into separate playlists and place a separate order for each playlist/design combination.

knowledge.title: I'm seeing wrong release years, why?
knowledge.description: In the overview it is possible to see different release years than on the final cards. This is because after purchase  we use an advanced AI algorithm to determine the original release year of songs, which are then double-checked by our team. Spotify's release years aren't always accurate, especially for remasters. We use multiple sources to ensure the correct original release year is printed on your cards. And even then, mistakes can happen. If you find an error you are able to correct it during the review process after purchase.

knowledge.title: What does the little robot icon mean in the summary list / on a card?
knowledge.description: The small robot icon you see next to a release year in the summary list (and on the card preview) means we are not yet 100% sure of that song's release year. This happens in two situations: (1) you are using a music service that does not provide release years (Tidal, Deezer, YouTube Music) — in that case the AI will determine the year for every track after purchase; or (2) you are using a service that does provide years (Spotify, Apple Music) but this is the first time we've encountered a particular song, so we cannot fully trust the year yet. In both cases, after you complete your purchase our AI determines the correct original release year (Spotify's year is often wrong for remasters), our team double-checks the result, and you get a chance to review and correct any year on the correction form before the cards are finalized. So the robot icon is not a problem — it just signals 'this year will still be verified'.

knowledge.title: I'm missing songs in the summary list, why?
knowledge.description: If you recently modified your Spotify playlist, QRSong! might have cached your playlist. In the list there is a button at the top to refresh your playlist from Spotify. Click that button to reload your playlist and update the summary list.

knowledge.title: There is a difference between the preview and final cards, why?
knowledge.description: The preview is a digital representation of your cards to give you an idea of the design and layout. The final cards are printed in high resolution on quality paper using professional printer  design. The preview may not accurately 100% reflect the true quality of the physical or digital cards you receive.

knowledge.title: Can I still change songs after I purchase?
knowledge.description: Yes, after purchase you will receive a link to review and correct your order. You can also reload your playlist from Spotify to update tracks, as long as you don't exceed the number of tracks you paid for. If you need more tracks please contact support and we'll provide you with a discount code that reflects the difference in price.

knowledge.title: What are the dimensions of the cards?
knowledge.description: The cards are 60 x 60 mm (2.36 x 2.36 inches) for both the real and digital cards.

knowledge.title: Is QRSong a subscription service?
knowledge.description: No, QRSong! is a one-time purchase. You pay once and own your QR music cards forever. There are no recurring fees, monthly charges, or hidden subscription costs. The price depends only on whether you choose digital PDF or physical cards, and how many tracks are in your playlist.

knowledge.title: Do I need Spotify Premium?
knowledge.description: Spotify Premium is recommended but not required. Premium supports 'Hidden mode' which plays songs in the QRSong! app without showing the artist or title. With Spotify Free, songs still play but the artist and title become visible after a short delay (3 seconds by default — you can change this delay to any value in the app settings). If you'd prefer hidden playback without a Spotify Premium subscription, you can also switch the music service in the app to Tidal or Deezer (no subscription needed) or Apple Music (subscription required).

knowledge.title: How does the QRSong app work?
knowledge.description: Download the free QRSong! companion app from the App Store or Google Play. Open the app, click the camera icon, and point it at the QR card. The song will start playing automatically and you can start guessing the song and artist!

knowledge.title: What can I do with the cards?
knowledge.description: The cards are perfect for game nights, parties, or just for fun! You can play a music quiz with friends, challenge your family to guess songs, or simply enjoy music in a new way. Great for birthdays, holidays, or any special occasion.

knowledge.title: What does it cost?
knowledge.description: The cost depends on whether you choose digital PDF cards or physical printed cards, and how many tracks are in your playlist. Volume discounts are available for digital orders of multiple playlists.

knowledge.title: What are the physical cards like?
knowledge.description: Physical cards are high-quality printed cards (350gsm paper) delivered to your doorstep. They are double-sided and printed in full color. Cards come in a transport box, neatly tied together with a paper band. No assembly required - ready to play right out of the box.

knowledge.title: What is the eco-friendly version?
knowledge.description: The eco-friendly version replaces the full-color background with a white background on the QR code side. This saves ink while keeping all functionality of the cards and app. Perfect for those who want to save on ink costs.

knowledge.title: How long does shipping take for physical cards?
knowledge.description: For physical cards, production starts after you approve your playlist in the review/correction form. Once approved, cards are normally printed and shipped within 2-3 business days from the Netherlands. Delivery time varies by country. We can provide estimated delivery times based on historical data for your specific country.

requiredData.name: countryCode
requiredData.description: The 2-letter ISO country code for the shipping destination (e.g. NL, DE, FR, US, GB). Convert the user's country name in any language to the correct ISO code.

knowledge.title: How long does digital delivery take?
knowledge.description: For pre-created playlists, the digital version is delivered immediately. For custom playlists, our AI algorithm determines release years which are double-checked by our team. This takes no longer than 24 hours, and is usually much faster during European office hours.

knowledge.title: Can I customize my cards?
knowledge.description: Yes! You can design your own cards by uploading a custom background image and/or logo. You can choose fonts, and customize QR code colors and backgrounds. You can see a preview of your design before finalizing.

knowledge.title: Can I modify the data on my cards?
knowledge.description: Yes! After purchase, you receive a correction form where you can review all data and make changes. You can correct song titles, artists, release years, and even add extra information like movie titles, country of origin, or personal messages.

knowledge.title: How are release years determined?
knowledge.description: We use an advanced AI algorithm to determine release years, which are then double-checked by our team. We do this because Spotify's release years aren't always accurate (especially for remasters). We use multiple sources to ensure the correct original release year.

knowledge.title: Is my phone suitable for QRSong?
knowledge.description: Yes! Almost any smartphone with a camera can scan the QR codes. If you have an iOS (12.0+) or Android (5.0+) phone that can scan QR codes, you can use our cards. You'll also need Spotify (or any other supported music service) installed.

knowledge.title: What payment methods are accepted?
knowledge.description: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, and many other payment methods. It's a one-time payment with no subscriptions or recurring fees.

knowledge.title: What is the maximum number of cards?
knowledge.description: For digital orders, the maximum is 3000 cards. For physical cards, the maximum is 1000 cards per order. If you need more, you can split your playlist and place multiple orders.

knowledge.title: Can the app scan other QR card types?
knowledge.description: Yes! The QRSong! app supports both QRSong! cards and Hitster cards, as well as any other cards that contain a Spotify URL. So you only need one app for all your music card games.

knowledge.title: Why can't the Hitster app scan my QRSong! cards?
knowledge.description: QRSong! is not affiliated with Hitster. The Hitster app can only scan Hitster cards and cannot read QRSong! cards. To scan QRSong! cards, you need to download the free QRSong! app from the App Store or Google Play. The QRSong! app actually supports both QRSong! and Hitster cards, so you can use it for all your music card games.

knowledge.title: What is the return policy?
knowledge.description: Due to the tailor-made nature of our products, we do not accept returns or offer refunds once delivered. For gift cards, refunds may be possible if none of the credit has been used. If there are printing mistakes, we can send a digital replacement.

knowledge.title: How do I share my Spotify playlist?
knowledge.description: Open Spotify, go to your playlist, click the share button, and copy the playlist URL. Paste this URL on our website to create your cards. Make sure your playlist is set to public - we cannot access private playlists.

knowledge.title: What are gift cards?
knowledge.description: QRSong! gift cards are perfect for music lovers. You can buy digital or physical gift cards starting from 10 euros. The recipient can use the credit to create their own QR music cards from any playlist they choose.

knowledge.title: What is OnzeVibe?
knowledge.description: OnzeVibe is QRSong!'s corporate music experience. Companies can create personalized QR music cards for employees. Employees vote for their favorite songs, creating a company top 200 playlist, and each employee receives a personalized box of cards.

knowledge.title: Do you offer pubquiz discounts?
knowledge.description: Yes! We support pubquiz organizers with special discount pricing for prizes. Your pubquiz must be an established event with online presence, you need to explain QRSong! when announcing prizes, and share winner photos for our socials.

knowledge.title: What is the sheets version?
knowledge.description: The sheets version delivers your cards on A4 sheets printed on the same 350g paper as individual cards. They are printed duplex, meaning both sides are printed. You cut them out yourself. Perfect for those who want professional quality but prefer to cut the cards themselves to save costs. No printer needed.

knowledge.title: What is volume discount?
knowledge.description: When you order multiple digital playlists at once, you automatically get volume discounts. No code needed - the discount is applied automatically. The more playlists you add, the more you save!

knowledge.title: What is hidden playback mode?
knowledge.description: Hidden mode is a feature in the QRSong! app (requires Spotify Premium) that plays songs without revealing the artist or title. Perfect for music quizzes and guessing games where you don't want to see the answer immediately.

knowledge.title: Can I use my own logo on cards?
knowledge.description: Yes! You can upload your own logo to appear at the top of your cards. Rectangular images work best. This is great for personalizing cards for events, businesses, or special occasions.

knowledge.title: What fonts can I choose?
knowledge.description: You can select from various font styles for the artist name and song title on the back of your card. This helps match your cards to your personal style or event theme.

knowledge.title: What playlist icons are available?
knowledge.description: You can choose from many emoji icons to represent your playlist, including music notes, hearts, stars, party emojis, and more. This icon is printed on your cards and helps you easily recognize different playlists.

knowledge.title: Can I hide the white circle on QR codes?
knowledge.description: Yes, but this is an advanced feature. You need to upload a custom background first. You take full responsibility for ensuring QR codes remain scannable. Use dark QR codes on light backgrounds for proper contrast. No refunds for unscannable cards.

knowledge.title: What is the double-sided PDF option?
knowledge.description: If you have a duplex printer, you can choose the double-sided PDF version which saves time and paper. If you don't have a duplex printer, choose single-sided - it's easier to align cards correctly.

knowledge.title: How does the correction process work?
knowledge.description: After purchase, you receive an email with a link to review your order. You can correct song titles, artists, years, and add extra information. You have 36 hours to review and approve your order — if you need more time, you can extend the deadline as many times as you like with a single click in the correction form (no extra cost). Once satisfied, you approve the order for printing. Physical orders ship only after your approval.

knowledge.title: Can I add a gift box after I've already paid?
knowledge.description: Yes. The correction form has a dedicated Gift Box tab where you can add a gift box to a physical order even if you didn't select one during checkout. You'll see exactly how many boxes your playlist needs (one box holds up to 190 cards), the price (with the same bulk discount as a regular order — 1 box €6.99, 5+ boxes €4.00 each), and a single 'Add to my order' button that takes you through a quick Mollie payment. Once paid, the gift box is unlocked and you can design the lid image, logo, and personal message right in the same tab. Because the box ships in the same package as your cards, there's no extra shipping cost. Quick note on what you're adding: the gift box is decorative gift packaging that arrives flat as a printed A3 cardboard sheet you press out and fold yourself at home, not a rigid premade game box like the ones you find with common retail board games.

knowledge.title: Can I add extra tracks to my playlist after paying?
knowledge.description: Yes. The correction form has an 'Add more tracks' option (visible on the Tracks tab and as a small '+ Add more' link in the order summary at the top). You can pick a tier — +10, +25, +50, +75, +100, or +200 tracks — and pay through Mollie. After the payment completes, the slots are added to your playlist. You then open your playlist on Spotify (or Apple Music / whichever service you used), add the new songs, come back to the correction form, and click the Reload button to pull the new tracks in. The extra cards are printed together with your existing order so there's no separate shipment.

knowledge.title: Can I add extra information to cards?
knowledge.description: Yes! You can add personalized details in a smaller font under the artist and song title. Perfect for movie titles, country of origin, personal messages to recipients, or fun facts about songs. Adding information can be done after puchase. You will receive a link to review and correct your order, but also add extra info there.

knowledge.title: What if my playlist has duplicates?
knowledge.description: If your playlist contains duplicate tracks, we'll notify you. You should remove duplicates from your Spotify playlist and click the refresh button to update your order.

knowledge.title: Can I reload my playlist from Spotify?
knowledge.description: Yes! After purchase, you can reload your playlist from Spotify to update tracks. However, you cannot exceed the number of tracks you paid for. There's also a rate limit on how often you can reload.

knowledge.title: What sets QRSong apart from competitors?
knowledge.description: Our attention to detail and commitment to quality. We use an advanced AI algorithm for release years instead of just relying on Spotify data. Our team manually verifies songs. We handle remasters and different recordings correctly.

knowledge.title: Is free shipping available?
knowledge.description: Yes — shipping is free in the Netherlands, Germany and Belgium when you order 2 or more playlists in a single order. For single-playlist orders to the Netherlands, shipping is a flat €2.99. Adding an extra playlist to your cart is often the cheapest way to qualify for free shipping. The same shipping cost applies regardless of how many card sets are in the order, so bundling really pays off.

knowledge.title: How do I contact QRSong?
knowledge.description: You can contact us through the contact form on our website. We'll get back to you as soon as possible. Our email is info@qrsong.io.

knowledge.title: What is QR Cards As A Service?
knowledge.description: QRCaaS is our developer API framework for building custom QR card games. We provide complete API infrastructure, AWS hosting, and can develop white-label versions of the QRSong! app with your branding and custom features.

knowledge.title: What languages are supported?
knowledge.description: QRSong! supports 14 languages: English, Dutch, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, Polish, Swedish, Norwegian, Russian, Japanese, Chinese and Hindi. The website and app are fully translated; the language on your printed cards follows your selection at order time.

knowledge.title: What paper quality are the physical cards?
knowledge.description: Physical cards are printed on high-quality 350gsm paper, double-sided in full color. They're sturdy, durable, and professionally printed.

knowledge.title: Can I use albums instead of playlists?
knowledge.description: No, QRSong! only works with Spotify playlists. We cannot process albums, podcasts, or episodes. Make sure you're sharing a playlist URL, not an album.

knowledge.title: Why can't I import 'This is...' playlists?
knowledge.description: Official Spotify 'This is...' playlists cannot be imported directly. To use them, create a copy by selecting all songs and creating a new playlist in your own account, then import that playlist.

knowledge.title: What is random snippet mode?
knowledge.description: Random snippet mode in the app plays different parts of songs for more challenging quizzes. Instead of always starting from the beginning, songs start from random positions.

knowledge.title: How are the physical cards packaged?
knowledge.description: Cards come in a transport box that fits in most mailboxes. They're neatly tied together with a paper band. Ready to play right out of the box - no assembly required.

knowledge.title: Can I request an extension for reviewing my order?
knowledge.description: Yes! The default review window is 36 hours, but if you need more time you can extend the deadline directly in the correction form with a single click. There is no limit — you can extend as many times as you like, for as long as you need, free of charge. Your order will not ship until you approve it.

knowledge.title: What happens after I pay?
knowledge.description: You'll receive a confirmation email with order details and a link to review/correct your cards. For physical orders, we check release data and design, then you approve before printing. You'll receive tracking when shipped.

knowledge.title: Do I need to keep my playlist public?
knowledge.description: Yes, keep your playlist public on Spotify until you receive your tracking email (for physical) or PDF email (for digital). After that, you can make it private again.

knowledge.title: What are curated playlists?
knowledge.description: We offer many pre-created playlists across various genres including disco, dance, rock, rap, and more. These are ready for instant delivery and perfect if you don't have your own playlist or want inspiration.

knowledge.title: Can I use QRSong for business events?
knowledge.description: Absolutely! QRSong! cards are great for corporate events, team building, and client gifts. Check out OnzeVibe for a complete corporate music experience, or contact us for custom business solutions.

knowledge.title: What is the review system?
knowledge.description: After receiving your order, you can leave feedback about your experience. Positive experiences can be shared on Trustpilot to help others find us. We value all feedback to improve our service.

knowledge.title: Can I change QR code colors?
knowledge.description: Yes! You can customize the QR code color and background color. Make sure to maintain good contrast - dark QR codes on light backgrounds work best for reliable scanning.

knowledge.title: What if I find an error in the data?
knowledge.description: If you find an error in release year or other data, let us know! If it's indeed a mistake on our end, we'll correct it and send you the corrected digital version for free.

knowledge.title: How do playback timer controls work?
knowledge.description: In the QRSong! app, you can set custom playback timers to control how long songs play during your quiz. This helps create the perfect difficulty level for your music game.

knowledge.title: Is there a newsletter?
knowledge.description: Yes! You can sign up for our newsletter to stay updated with announcements, roadmap progress, and exclusive discounts. We respect your privacy and you can unsubscribe anytime.

knowledge.title: Do you support Apple Music?
knowledge.description: Yes and no. Currently, QRSong! supports playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, Tidal, Deezer, and YouTube Music. In the QRSong app you can choose Apple Music as your preferred music service to play songs through Apple Music with full hidden playback. An active Apple Music subscription is required for playback.

knowledge.title: Can I still change my address after purchase?
knowledge.description: As long as your order hasn't been taken into production, you can change your shipping address. Contact us at info@qrsong.io as soon as possible with the new address details.

knowledge.title: What is QRGames?
knowledge.description: QRGames! is an add-on for your QRSong! playlists that unlocks three interactive music games: Music Quiz, Music Bingo, and Music Timeline. It costs €5 per playlist (with volume discounts for multiple playlists: 10% off for 2+, 20% off for 3+, 30% off for 4+). Once enabled, you can host games directly from your dashboard using any playlist you own.

knowledge.title: How does the Music Quiz game work?
knowledge.description: Music Quiz is a real-time multiplayer music quiz game (like Kahoot! but for music). The host displays questions on a big screen while players join by scanning a QR code with their phone. Players answer questions on their devices during a timer. There are multiple question types: guess the artist, guess the release year, guess the song title, fill in the missing word, trivia questions, order tracks by release date, and guess the decade. The host controls the game flow: playing tracks, showing questions, and revealing answers. Scores are calculated based on speed and correctness, with streak bonuses for consecutive correct answers. A live leaderboard is shown after each question. You can create quizzes with AI-generated questions or write your own. You need at least 5 tracks to create a quiz.

knowledge.title: How does Music Bingo work?
knowledge.description: Music Bingo is a music-themed bingo game. After purchasing QRGames for a playlist, bingo cards are automatically generated as a downloadable PDF/ZIP. You print the cards and hand them out to contestants. The host plays songs from the playlist and marks them on a host screen. Players listen and check off songs on their printed bingo card. Players can verify their card by scanning the QR code on their bingo card with their phone. The system supports four win modes: horizontal line, vertical line, diagonal line, or full card. You need at least 75 tracks in your playlist for bingo. Default generation creates cards for 20 contestants across 5 rounds.

knowledge.title: How does Music Timeline work?
knowledge.description: Music Timeline is a solo game where you arrange songs in chronological order by release year. The game picks random tracks from your playlist (you can choose 5, 10, 15, or 20 tracks) and you drag and drop them into the correct timeline order. After each placement you see whether you got it right or wrong. It's a fun way to test your music knowledge on your own. No other players needed - you play directly in your browser.

knowledge.title: How much does QRGames cost?
knowledge.description: QRGames costs €5 per playlist. Volume discounts apply when you enable games for multiple playlists at once: 10% off for 2+ playlists, 20% off for 3+ playlists, and 30% off for 4+ playlists. This is a one-time purchase - no subscription needed. Once enabled, you can play all three games (Quiz, Bingo, and Timeline) unlimited times with that playlist.

knowledge.title: How do I enable QRGames for my playlist?
knowledge.description: Go to your dashboard and find the playlist you want to enable games for. Click the games option and complete the payment. Once purchased, you'll have access to all three games (Music Quiz, Music Bingo, and Music Timeline) for that playlist. Bingo cards are automatically generated after purchase.

knowledge.title: How do I host a Music Quiz?
knowledge.description: First create a quiz from your playlist in the dashboard. You can use AI to generate questions or write your own. Then click 'Host Quiz' to start a game room. A QR code and room link appear on screen for players to join. Players scan the QR code with their phone to connect. Once everyone has joined, you control the game: play the track, show the question, reveal the answer, and display the leaderboard. Display the host screen on a big screen or TV for the best experience.

knowledge.title: How many tracks do I need for Music Bingo?
knowledge.description: You need at least 75 tracks in your playlist to play Music Bingo. This ensures enough variety for the bingo cards. Each card contains 24 random tracks from your playlist (plus a free center space), so having more tracks creates more unique cards for players.

knowledge.title: How do players join a Music Quiz?
knowledge.description: Players join by scanning the QR code displayed on the host screen with their phone's camera, or by navigating to the room link directly. No account or app download is needed - it works in any mobile browser. Players pick an avatar and wait in the lobby until the host starts the game.

knowledge.title: Which music streaming platforms are supported?
knowledge.description: QRSong! supports playlists from 5 music streaming services: Spotify, Apple Music, Tidal, Deezer, and YouTube Music. Simply paste the URL of your public playlist from any of these services. Each platform has different capabilities regarding release year data and hidden playback. See the detailed entries for each platform for specifics.

knowledge.title: I made my playlist on one service — will the cards also work on Deezer / Tidal / Apple Music / YouTube Music?
knowledge.description: Yes. The cards are not locked to the service you used to create your playlist. When you create a Spotify playlist (or one on any other supported service), our system automatically searches for matching links on all the other supported platforms — Spotify, Apple Music, Tidal, Deezer, and YouTube Music. This means a friend or player can scan the same card and play the song in whichever music service they prefer. We aim for over 97% cross-platform coverage, and in practice it works very well. The only caveat is that there is no guarantee every single song exists on every platform — catalogs differ slightly between services, so a small number of tracks may occasionally be missing on one platform. But overall, cards made from a playlist on one service will absolutely work on the other services too.

knowledge.title: How does Spotify work with QRSong?
knowledge.description: Spotify has full support. Just paste any public Spotify playlist URL to create your cards. Release years are included and verified by our AI and team. When playing with the QRSong app, there are three playback modes you can choose in the settings: 1) Hidden mode (Spotify Premium required): the song plays in the app without showing the artist or title — perfect for music quizzes. 2) Countdown mode: a countdown is shown, then the Spotify app opens and plays the song — you'll see the artist and title in Spotify. 3) No Spotify mode: the song plays in the QRSong app but the artist and title are visible. We recommend Spotify Premium with hidden mode for the best experience. Note: only playlists are supported — albums, podcasts, and episodes cannot be used. Spotify-curated playlists (like 'This is...') must first be copied to your own account.

knowledge.title: How does Apple Music work with QRSong?
knowledge.description: Apple Music has full support. Just paste any public Apple Music playlist URL to create your cards. Release years are included and verified by our AI and team. When playing with the QRSong app, songs play without showing the artist or title — full hidden playback on both iPhone and Android. You do need an active Apple Music subscription to play songs. You don't need a subscription to create the cards, only to play them.

knowledge.title: How does Tidal work with QRSong?
knowledge.description: Tidal is supported. Just paste your Tidal playlist URL to create your cards. Release years are not available from Tidal, so our AI determines the correct years after purchase. These are verified by our team and you can review and correct them before finalizing. When playing with the QRSong app, songs play in the app without showing the artist or title. You can select Tidal as your preferred music service in the app settings. No Tidal subscription is needed.

knowledge.title: How does Deezer work with QRSong?
knowledge.description: Deezer is supported. Just paste any public Deezer playlist URL to create your cards. Release years are not available from Deezer, so our AI determines the correct years after purchase. These are verified by our team and you can review and correct them before finalizing. When playing with the QRSong app, songs play in the app without showing the artist or title. You can select Deezer as your preferred music service in the app settings. No Deezer subscription is needed.

knowledge.title: How does YouTube Music work with QRSong?
knowledge.description: YouTube Music is supported but with some limitations. Just paste your YouTube Music playlist URL to create your cards. Release years are not available from YouTube Music, so our AI determines the correct years after purchase. These are verified by our team and you can review and correct them before finalizing. When playing with the QRSong app, there is no hidden playback. A countdown is shown, then the YouTube Music app opens and plays the song — the artist and title will be visible immediately. If you'd prefer hidden playback, we suggest switching to Spotify (with Premium), Apple Music, Deezer, or Tidal in the app settings.

knowledge.title: How does playback work when scanning QRSong cards?
knowledge.description: The QRSong app offers different playback experiences depending on your chosen music service and settings. Spotify with hidden mode (requires Spotify Premium): the song plays in the app without showing the artist or title — the best way to play for music quizzes. Spotify with countdown mode: a countdown is shown, then the Spotify app opens and plays the song (artist and title will be visible). No Spotify mode: the song plays in the QRSong app but the artist and title are shown. Apple Music: songs play in the app without showing artist or title — full hidden playback (requires Apple Music subscription). Deezer and Tidal: songs play in the QRSong app without showing artist or title — a great alternative if you don't have Spotify Premium or Apple Music. YouTube Music: a countdown is shown, then the YouTube Music app opens (artist and title visible immediately — no hidden playback). You can switch your preferred music service in the app settings at any time.

knowledge.title: My Android phone shows the artist and title in a notification (Samsung Now Bar / Live Notifications), how do I hide it?
knowledge.description: On newer Android phones, especially Samsung with One UI 7 / 8, a small notification tile (Now Bar / Live Notifications) can appear at the top of the screen showing the currently playing song's artist and title, even while the QRSong! app is open. This spoils the guess. How to hide it: (1) Samsung: go to Settings > Lock screen and AOD > Live notifications, and turn off Media player. On some devices this option is not in the menu directly, so use the search field in Settings and search for 'Live notifications'. Note: this also removes media controls from the lock screen, but during QRSong! gameplay that is actually desired. (2) Stock Android / Pixel: long-press the Spotify notification in the notification shade, tap the gear icon, and disable the 'Now playing' or 'Media playback' notification channel. As a stronger fallback, go to Settings > Notifications > Notifications on lock screen > Don't show any notifications (this hides all lock-screen notifications, not just Spotify). (3) No-settings alternative: place the phone face-down during play, or play through an external speaker.

knowledge.title: Why can I only create an account after I've made a purchase?
knowledge.description: QRSong! does not offer a separate sign-up flow because an account is only useful once you have an order. After your first purchase you'll receive an email with a link to set a password, and from that moment on you can log in to view your orders, re-download digital cards, host games, manage your playlists, and place new orders more quickly. So the simplest way to get an account is to place an order — even a small digital one — and use the link in the confirmation email to activate it.

knowledge.title: I forgot my password / I can't log in. How do I reset it?
knowledge.description: On the login page, click 'Forgot password' and enter the email address you used when ordering. We'll send you an email with a reset link — click it and choose a new password. The link is valid for a limited time, so use it soon. If you don't see the email within a few minutes, check your spam/junk folder. Still no email? Make sure you're using the same email address as on your order (check your order confirmation email). If you're still stuck, contact support at info@qrsong.io and we'll help you regain access.

knowledge.title: I didn't receive my verification or activation email, what should I do?
knowledge.description: Most of the time the email is just delayed by a minute or two, or it landed in your spam/junk folder — please check there first (and also any 'Promotions' or 'Updates' tabs in Gmail). If after 10 minutes there's still no email: (1) double-check that the email address on your order is spelled correctly, (2) try adding info@qrsong.io to your contacts and request the email again from the login or order page, (3) if you use a strict corporate or school mail filter, try a personal address. If none of that works, email us at info@qrsong.io from the address you used at checkout and we'll verify your account manually.

knowledge.title: Where do I find my invoice?
knowledge.description: An invoice (PDF) is generated automatically once your payment is confirmed. You can find it in two places: (1) attached to or linked from your order confirmation email, and (2) inside your account on the website under your order details, where you can re-download it any time. If you need a corrected invoice (different company name, VAT ID, or billing address) please contact us at info@qrsong.io with your order number — we can re-issue it for you.

knowledge.title: Can I use a different billing address than my shipping address?
knowledge.description: Yes. During checkout you can tick the option to enter a separate invoice address, which is useful if you're shipping a gift to someone else or if your company should be billed to a different location than where the cards arrive. The shipping address is used purely for delivery; the invoice address (and optional company name and VAT ID) is what appears on your invoice and is used for tax purposes.

knowledge.title: How much does shipping cost to my country?
knowledge.description: Shipping is calculated automatically at checkout based on your country and the number of card sets in your order. As a quick guide: shipping is free in the Netherlands, Germany and Belgium when you order 2 or more playlists; single-playlist orders to the Netherlands ship for €2.99 flat. For other countries the exact cost is shown in the cart before payment — there are no hidden fees added afterwards. If you'd like an estimate before going to checkout, tell me which country you're shipping to and I can look up the typical delivery time for you.

knowledge.title: Which payment methods can I use?
knowledge.description: Checkout is handled by Mollie, so you can pay with all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, Apple Pay, iDEAL (Netherlands), Bancontact (Belgium), Klarna (pay later / pay in installments where available), SEPA bank transfer, and several other local methods depending on your country. The available options are shown automatically at checkout based on where you're shipping to. All payments are one-time — there are no subscriptions, recurring charges, or stored cards on our side.

knowledge.title: Can you delete my account and personal data (GDPR)?
knowledge.description: Yes — you can request deletion of your personal data at any time by emailing info@qrsong.io from the address linked to your account. Please note: data that is part of an invoice (your name, address, order details) must be retained for 7 years for tax/accounting reasons under Dutch law, so we cannot remove that information until that period has passed. Everything outside that legal requirement (account login, marketing preferences, saved playlists, design uploads) can be deleted on request. You can also request a copy of the personal data we hold about you under GDPR.

knowledge.title: What can I do with a QRSong! account?
knowledge.description: Once you have an account (created automatically after your first order) you can: view your full order history, re-download digital PDFs of all your card sets, re-download invoices, re-open the correction form for orders still in review, manage your saved playlists and designs, host QRGames (Music Quiz, Music Bingo, Music Timeline) for any playlist you've enabled them on, place new orders without re-entering your details, and update your password and email preferences.

knowledge.title: Do you offer custom branded boxes for large orders?
knowledge.description: Yes — for business orders of more than 50 boxes we can produce fully custom branded boxes with your own design printed on the exterior. This is a separate, premium product from our standard consumer gift box: business branded boxes are rigid, premade boxes (sturdy SK2 board, comparable to retail board-game boxes), available in 48-card, 96-card and 192-card formats, printed inside and out in your house style. This is a custom service, so lead time and pricing depend on the design and quantity. To get a quote, email us at info@qrsong.io with the number of boxes you need, your timeline, and a rough idea of the artwork you have in mind, and we'll get back to you with options. Note: this is different from the standard consumer gift box (an optional add-on during checkout), which is a foldable A3 press-and-fold cardboard sheet for gifting and is not available in a rigid premade format.

knowledge.title: What is Music Match?
knowledge.description: Music Match is a separate musical card game from QRSong! and Source 1 Media — a partnership product. Each player gets 7 Match cards. The DJ scans a QR card to play a song, and players race to be the first to play a Match card from their hand that fits the song (by artist, genre, decade, and other categories). The first player to get rid of all their cards wins. It's a great party game on its own and is sold separately from regular QRSong! card sets.

knowledge.title: What does 350gsm paper mean?
knowledge.description: GSM stands for 'grams per square meter' and tells you how heavy and sturdy the paper is. For reference: regular printer/copy paper is 80gsm, postcards are around 200gsm, and standard playing cards are typically 280-310gsm. Our cards are printed on 350gsm — heavier and stiffer than most playing cards, so they feel premium, hold up to repeated handling and shuffling, and don't bend or curl easily.

knowledge.title: What is QRSong! doing to be more sustainable?
knowledge.description: A few practical things: (1) The eco-friendly card option uses a white background on the QR side, which significantly reduces ink usage during printing. (2) The digital PDF version uses no paper at all — perfect if you're happy to print at home or play purely digitally. (3) Multi-playlist orders ship together in one parcel rather than separately, reducing packaging and transport. (4) Our gift boxes ship flat as a single A3 sheet that you fold yourself, which cuts shipping volume dramatically compared to pre-assembled boxes. We're continuing to look for ways to reduce the footprint of our printing and shipping.
